# Idea Template

## Idea Header
- Idea ID: `<I-xxx>`
- Title: `<idea title>`
- Date: `<YYYY-MM-DD>`
- Source: `<customer/team/data/other>`
- Owner: `<name or role>`

## Problem
- Current Problem: `<problem statement>`
- Affected User: `<user group>`

## Value Hypothesis
- Expected Benefit: `<business/user value>`
- Success Signal: `<how to detect benefit>`

## Notes
- Constraints: `<constraints>`
- Dependencies: `<dependencies>`
- Open Questions: `<unknowns>`

## Triage Outcome
- Status: `<new/triage/shaping/parked/rejected>`
- Next Step: `<action>`
